title: Oracle Solaris Zone Statistics
description: Represents resource utilization statistics for an Oracle Solaris Zone, including CPU, memory, swap, and process metrics collected via the kstat interface and libzonestat library.

cpu_cap.description: CPU cap value as a percentage of a single CPU (100 = 1 full CPU)

cpu_usage.description: Current CPU usage as a percentage

cpu_nwait.description: Number of times zone threads waited due to CPU cap

memory_usage.description: Current physical memory usage (RSS) in bytes

swap_usage.description: Current swap space usage in bytes

nprocs.description: Number of processes running in the zone

nlwps.description: Number of lightweight processes (threads) in the zone

pr_size.description: Total virtual size of all processes in bytes

pr_rss.description: Total resident set size of all processes in bytes
